channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: 2026 salary AI skills: test vs vector search
item.description: Cut AI spend 77% and double accuracy with prompt engineering vs vector search — the 2026 salary data, benchmarks, and code you need to decide where to invest

item.title: Stop wasting database connections
item.description: Cut API response time 60% by reducing pool size — connection pooling mistakes cost teams $8k+ monthly in wasted RDS instances and outages

item.title: Negotiate remote salary without the bank tax
item.description: Land remote jobs at US rates from anywhere — concrete numbers, fee calculators, and negotiation scripts that cut through the noise.

item.title: Simplicity wins: when over-engineering backfires
item.description: Cut monthly infra costs 96% by replacing Kafka + Redis with a simple HTTP service — latency dropped from 450 ms to 42 ms and on-call pages from 12 to 2. The real cost of over-engineering exposed.

item.title: Multi-agent systems in prod: the ugly bits
item.description: The latency between agent calls started at 800ms, then climbed to 3.2 seconds, then the whole thing locked up when the queue hit 2,150 messages.

item.title: 2026: Best dev platforms for African devs
item.description: Toptal’s US-based support was faster, but their developers in Accra were using shared VPS instances with 200ms latency to our API.

item.title: Simplicity won the race: how we killed a microservice
item.description: Cut API response time 62% by merging three services into one sidecar design — latency, cost, and error-rate numbers from a 2026 production rollout

item.title: Why RAG tutorials crash in production
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline costs 75% and latency 68% — the real levers most tutorials skip: chunk granularity, retrieval budget, and conditional reranking

item.title: WebSockets vs SSE vs long-polling: which fits?
item.description: Benchmark WebSocket vs SSE vs long-polling in 2026 — median latency, cost, and the exact t3.small numbers you can copy into your RFC.

item.title: Script your remote raise: $120k counter
item.description: Land $120k remote offers from US companies with a 160-line Python script that normalizes cost-of-living, tax, and equity. Benchmarked on 37 real 2026 offers.

item.title: Build this portfolio, not that one
item.description: Build a remote-ready portfolio in 7 days — fintech stack, load tests, and the debugging story most teams skip. Concrete results from Nairobi hiring funnels.

item.title: 2 devs, 1M req/day, no K8s
item.description: Then we discovered tools that let a team of two ship a service handling 1,200 requests per second within 30 days without touching Kubernetes manifests.

item.title: Connection pools: set max too high and waste 8k
item.description: Cut RDS costs 30% by tuning connection pools — idle timeout 10s beats max size tricks. PostgreSQL 16, Node 20, Python 3.11 benchmarks inside.

item.title: AI skills salary hack: prompt engineers vs ML infra
item.description: Prompt engineers make USD 150k while ML infra engineers make USD 195k in 2026. See the exact skills, benchmarks, and infra tasks that move the needle — plus the mistake that cost one team USD 8.4k.

item.title: Push live updates cheaper without WebSockets
item.description: Cut real-time update latency 60% without WebSockets — SNS+Lambda+WebSocket vs SSE vs polling benchmarks (2026).

item.title: Salary boosters: Python vs SQL vs AI in 2026
item.description: Cut AI cloud costs 92% by moving vector search from Python to DuckDB — latency, salary data, and the exact benchmark I ran in 2026.

item.title: AI tools that made non-CS side projects prod-ready
item.description: Ship a real product in hours — the 3 AI-powered tools non-traditional developers use to go from 'it works on my machine' to production in 2026

item.title: Ship production, not stars
item.description: A production-style incident report, a load-tested REST API, and a write-up of how you debugged a race condition under load beat 1,000 empty repository…

item.title: Max pool size isn't about CPU
item.description: In practice, I've seen teams set their pool size to 20 connections for a 100-connection database, only to watch their API response times climb from 45ms…

item.title: RAG in prod: what tutorials never mention
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 79% and GPU costs 67% with Redis caching, vector index tuning, and embedding model swap — the mistakes most tutorials don’t mention.
